description: A gourmet market is deploying new deli scales that print custom weight-embedded barcodes. Configure the barcode nomenclature to recognize EAN-13 barcodes using the prefix '24', followed by a 5-digit product code and a 5-digit weight in kilograms (2 integer digits and 3 decimal digits). Create a storable product named 'Prosciutto di Parma' with the unit of measure set to kg, a sales price of $35.00, and the product code 55001 assigned to its barcode.
